methods.name: robot_control.utils.BaseControlGroup.from_string
documentation: Creates an enum member from a string representation.
Base class for control group enumerations.

classes.name: robot_control.utils.GR1ControlGroup
documentation: GR1 Control group enumeration. Each group is a tuple of (start, num_joints). Available groups are: ALL, LEFT_LEG, RIGHT_LEG, WAIST, HEAD, LEFT_ARM, RIGHT_ARM, LOWER, UPPER, UPPER_EXTENDED.

classes.name: robot_control.utils.GR2ControlGroup
documentation: GR2 Control group enumeration. Each group is a tuple of (start, num_joints). Available groups are: ALL, LEFT_LEG, RIGHT_LEG, WAIST, HEAD, LEFT_ARM, RIGHT_ARM, LOWER, UPPER, UPPER_EXTENDED.

classes.name: robot_control.exceptions.ThreadExitException
documentation: Trigger a thread to exit.

documentation: Enable or disable the motors.

documentation: Get the joint positions of a group.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.get_group_position_by_name
documentation:
Get the joint positions of a group by its name.

Args:
    name (str): The name of the group. Available group names: 'left_leg', 'right_leg', 'waist', 'head', 'left_arm', 'right_arm'.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.enable
documentation: Enable the motors.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.disable
documentation: Disable the motors.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.set_gains
documentation:
Set PID gains.

Args:
    position_control_kp (list[float]): The proportional gains for position control. 
    velocity_control_kp (list[float]): The proportional gains for velocity control.
    velocity_control_ki (list[float]): The integral gains for velocity control.
    joint_names (list[str], optional): The names of the joints to set the gains for. Defaults to None, which sets all of the joints.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.get_gains
documentation: Get the control gains for all joints.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.move_joints
documentation:
Move in joint space with time duration.

Move in joint space with time duration in a separate thread. Can be aborted using `abort()`. Can be blocking.
If the duration is set to 0, the joints will move in their maximum speed without interpolation.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.forward_kinematics
documentation:
Get the end effector pose of the specified chains in base_link frame.

!!! info
    The available chain names are: `head`, `left_arm`, `right_arm`, with corresponding end effector frames: `head_yaw_link`, `left_end_effector_link`, `right_end_effector_link`, and the transformation matrices are in the `base_link` frame.

Args:
    chain_names (list[str]): The chains to get the end effector pose of. Available chain names: 'head', 'left_arm', 'right_arm'.
    q (np.ndarray, optional): The robot confiuration to do forward kinematics in. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    list: The end effector pose is a list of 4x4 transformation matrices. The order of the matrices is the same as the order of the chain names. The transformation matrix is in the `base_link` frame.

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.inverse_kinematics
documentation:
Get the joint positions for the specified chains to reach the target pose in base_link frame.

Args:
    chain_names (list[str]): The chains to get the joint positions for. Available chain names: 'head', 'left_arm', 'right_arm'.
    targets (list[np.ndarray]): The target poses in base_link frame.
    move (bool, optional): Whether to move the robot to the target pose. Defaults to False.
    dt (float): The time step for the inverse kinematics.

Returns:
    np.ndarray: The joint positions to reach the target pose (in radians).

methods.name: robot_control.controller.RobotController.end
documentation: End the robot control.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.q_real
documentation: Get q vector in the real robot convention (length is 32, order same as config.joint_names).

documentation: Set from a q vector in the real robot convention (length is 32, order same as config.joint_names)).

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.q_real2pink
documentation: Convert q vector from real robot convention to pink convention.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.q_pink2real
documentation: Convert q vector from pink convention to real robot convention.

documentation: Get joint object by its name.

Get joint index in Pinocchio configuration vector by its name.

Args:

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.get_q_from_name

Get joint position in Pinocchio configuration vector by its name.

Args:

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.get_idx_v_from_name
documentation:
Get joint index in Pinocchio velocity vector by its name.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.add_frame
documentation:
Add a dummy frame to the robot model.

Args:
    frame_name (str): Name of the frame.
    parent (str): Name of the parent frame.
    transform (pin.SE3 | None, optional): Transform from parent frame to the new frame. Defaults to None. If None, identity transform is used.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.set_joint_positions
documentation:
Set joint positions in the robot configuration.

Args:
    joint_names (list[str]): Names of the joints.
    positions (np.ndarray): Joint positions, AKA `q` vector in the robot definition.
    degrees (bool, optional): If True, positions are in degrees. Defaults to False.
    clip (bool, optional): If True, clip joint limits. Defaults to True.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.get_joint_positions
documentation:
Get joint positions of given joints.

Args:
    joint_names (Sequence[str]): list of joint names

Returns:
    q (NDArray): joint positions

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.set_joint_limits
documentation:
Set joint upper and lower limits. Note this does not update the robot data.

Args:
    joint_name (str): Name of the joint.
    lower (float): Lower limit.
    upper (float): Upper limit.

methods.name: robot_control.robot_wrapper.RobotWrapper.set_velocity_limit
documentation:
Set joint velocity limit. Note this does not update the robot data.

Args:
    joint_name (str): Name of the joint.
    limit (float): Velocity limit.

documentation: Display the current configuration in the visualizer.
